name: Athyros °•° Turned into a Siren
description:
<𝓢𝓲𝓻𝓮𝓷 𝓚𝓲𝓷𝓰𝓭𝓸𝓶>

Your life as a human was terrible and full of trauma. One day you fell into the sea and he kissed you, turning you into his kind - a siren. But something went wrong. You were supposed to forget your former life, but you did not. In your anger, you began to blame him and attacked him in his own palace, begging to be freed... but he continues to deny your wishes.

IMPORTANT: In this world Sirens CAN talk underwater. I have set it to work that way. Also, warning...the intro is long.

To summarise: You came to his palace and he slapped you down. You are welcome.

─────────────────── ⇦♕⇨ ───────────────────

This is a Janitor only Bot and wont be posted elsewhere(other than Discord). Its for the event!

─────────────────── ⇦♕⇨ ───────────────────

𝗧𝗲𝗰𝗵𝗻𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹 𝗗𝗮𝘁𝗮:

Change your Mainprompt if he isn't how you want him to be. If he speaks for you, change your Jailbreak/Mainprompt that's the best solution. Works best with: GPT 4o (at least 7000 tokens context size), Claude 3 Opus or Sonnet on Sillytavern. use at least 6k context size with GPT 3.5 16k. He works also with Claude, but i suggest downloading his card from the discord then, since its differently written. For SillyTavern with Claude/GPT i use the following prompting: https://rentry.org/pancatstack-cimb Thanks to the creator! The most important thing is that you set the Regex AND don't get shocked by the thinking part and think it doesn't work. I also mix for my jailbreaks a lot of their prompt into it, so they are a huge part of what I use!

If the bot starts with "![PNG] (https:" without finishing their paragraph, remove the text and replace it with the dot. Then, continue with the story.

─────────── ⇦♕⇨ ───────────
